sql: SELECT * FROM customers
SELECT * FROM products
SELECT * FROM orders

nl: Show orders placed in the last 30 days
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at >= date('now', '-30 days')

nl: Find the top 5 products by price
sql: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 5

nl: Count of orders where status equals shipped
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders WHERE status = 'shipped'
SELECT AVG(total_amount) AS avg_total_amount FROM orders
SELECT * FROM products WHERE price > 100
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at = date('now')
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE email LIKE '%gmail.com%'
SELECT p.category, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE quantity BETWEEN 2 AND 5
SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spend FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM customers

nl: List orders sorted by total amount descending
sql: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY total_amount DESC

nl: Show products in the Electronics category
sql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics'
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'
SELECT AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products

nl: Sum of total amount from orders
sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS sum_total_amount FROM orders

nl: Orders for customer named Alice Johnson
sql: SELECT o.* FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.name = 'Alice Johnson'

nl: List products sorted by price ascending
sql: SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price ASC
SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at = date('now', '-1 day')

nl: Count of products in each category
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM products GROUP BY category
SELECT * FROM products WHERE price < 50
SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at >= date('now', 'start of year')
SELECT * FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1

nl: Average order amount for each customer
sql: SELECT c.name, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_total_amount FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name

nl: List orders with total amount greater than 100
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE total_amount > 100

nl: Find the top 5 products by total sales
sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 5

nl: Total revenue by product category in descending order
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
SELECT name, email FROM customers
SELECT name, price FROM products

nl: Orders for customer named Alice Johnson in 2025
sql: SELECT o.* FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.name = 'Alice Johnson' AND o.created_at >= '2025-01-01' AND o.created_at < '2026-01-01'
